high_complexity_tasks.title: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should Register and enroll in available courses for the upcoming semester.
task_titles: Implement student registration and course enrollment workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Instructor — The Instructor should Allow instructors to upload grades and course materials for enrolled students.
task_titles: Implement grades and course materials for enrolled upload workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Student — The Student should Allow academic advisors to review student academic progress and suggest courses.
task_titles: Implement student academic progress and suggest courses viewing workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should Generate tuition invoices and process online payment for registered students.
task_titles: Implement tuition invoices and process online payment creation workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Student — The Student should Send automated email notifications to students for deadlines and grade updates.
task_titles: Implement automated email to students notification workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Registrar — The Registrar should Allow the registrar to manage course schedules and assign instructors to courses.
task_titles: Implement course schedules and assign instructors management workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should Support transcript requests and official document generation for graduating students.
task_titles: Implement transcript requests and official document generation support workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide ideally integrate with a third-party learning management system if budget allows.
The system should maintain high availability.
task_titles: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should maintain responsive performance under peak load.
The system should support Arabic and English UI.
The system should comply with local university data protection regulations.
task_titles: Comply with local university data protection

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should maintain responsive performance for concurrent users.
The system should support mobile-friendly interfaces.

risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Compliance-oriented requirements are present and should be validated early to avoid late rework.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
5 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.
1 tasks are marked as optional or low-confidence scope and should be planned outside the confirmed delivery baseline.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: education and learning management.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 8 functional task(s) and 6 non-functional task(s); 1 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.

committee_brief.graph_summary: 14 requirements -> 14 atomic tasks across 4 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T009 -> T001 -> T008 (3 hops, ~10 story points, estimated 7 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints blocks 7 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 7 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 372 estimated hours | FR: 182h | NFR: 190h.
